message:
refactor: Add comptime helpers to mod_helper.zig, reduce code size

- Add builtin1, stdmath1, stdmathT, stdmath2 helpers for math functions
- Add binop, unary, shift helpers for operator functions
- Refactor math_mod.zig: 141→120 lines (-21)
- Refactor operator_mod.zig: 133→111 lines (-22)
- Replace all @import("main.zig") with h.CodegenError/h.NativeCodegen
- Total reduction: 7393→7350 lines (-43)
